title: FAQ
subtitle: Things I get asked a lot

questions.label: Tell me about your background.
questions.content: 10+ years across AI, backend, embedded systems, and hardware-integrated platforms — in both enterprise and experimental environments. I started programming at 11, worked across the US and Japan, led engineering teams of 5–15 people, founded an R&D-driven AI company, and exited with profit. I combine technical depth with a research mindset and real delivery experience.

questions.label: What kind of teams have you led?
questions.content: Both inside established organizations and within my own company. In Japan I led teams of 5–15 engineers across AI, embedded, and web systems — owning architecture, framework design, and coordination. As a founder I also built and led my own team across R&D projects and client work.

questions.label: What happened with your company?
questions.content: I founded an R&D-driven AI and systems engineering company, ran it as an experimental operation delivering real products, and successfully sold its intellectual property at a profit. I now want to bring that founder-level ownership and R&D mindset into a new team.

questions.label: What technologies do you work with?
questions.content: TypeScript/JavaScript (Vue, Nuxt, Node.js), Python (AI/automation), C/C++ (embedded), C#/.NET, Java/Kotlin, OpenCV, TensorFlow, AWS/GCP/Azure, Docker, Linux, WebRTC.

questions.label: What domains have you shipped production work in?
questions.content: Computer vision and image analysis pipelines, medical posture analysis, autonomous driving systems, WebRTC live streaming, robot control, embedded systems (Arduino/Raspberry Pi/Jetson), matching platforms, EC platforms, and cloud backend systems.

questions.label: What roles are you open to?
questions.content: Senior Software Engineer, AI/Computer Vision Engineer, Systems Architect, Tech Lead, or Applied AI/Systems Researcher. Open to full-time, contract, or consulting. Available in Japan or remote.

questions.label: What languages do you speak?
questions.content: Portuguese (native), English (fluent, TOEIC 892), Japanese (business level, JLPT N2), and Spanish (conversational).
